resources.string: Do you want to allow SumaMente to send you notifications?
Enter your username.\nUse between 4 and 12 characters
Complete the previous levels to unlock this level.
Do you want to exit the game?
Progress ring showing the remaining time
Choose the correct answer from multiple options.
You have used all your attempts!
Select the data you want to reset
Are you sure you want to reset the selected data?
What data do you want to edit?
The name must be between 4 and 12 characters long.
Oops! It seems someone is already using \nthat name, try another one.
"The %1$s numbers are repeated. Add them up correctly!"
"The %1$s numbers are repeated. Add them up correctly!"
"Watch out, some numbers might be %1$s. Add them correctly!"
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
Are you sure you want to change the flag?
Add all the numbers except the first one
Add all the numbers except the second one
Add all the numbers except the third one
Add all the numbers except the last one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the first one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the second one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the third one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the last one
Time limit not found for level %1$d
Solve the operations considering positive and negative numbers.
Add the integers, decimals, Roman numerals, and letters. Some may be negative!
Choose the \nresponse mode \nyou like the most
We will show you in 3 simple steps how to play…
First step: Decide how you want to play, you\'re in control!
Step two: Numbers will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Focus and get ready! Let\'s see an example:
Step Two: Decimal numbers will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see a Deci example:
Step Two: ROMAN numbers will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see a Deci example:
Step two: Letters and numbers will appear. A=1, B=2, etc., etc. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see an example:
Step two: Letters, numbers, ROMAN numerals, and DECIMALS will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see an example:
Step two: Letters, numbers, fractions, and SQUARE ROOTS will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see an example:
Third step: Calculate the result of the numbers you saw.
Write or choose the correct answer before time runs out!
Great! Now let\'s see how much time you took and how many points you scored. 😊
You\'re ready! It\'s time to play and have fun. 🚀
Are you sure you want to exit without selecting a difficulty level? You\'ll have to choose next time you enter.
You must complete the previous level to unlock this level again
SumaMente CHALLENGES! Compete and win prizes with players from around the world. We will notify you when the next event takes place. Get ready to shine!
• Each game gives you points when you answer correctly
• If you get all your answers right, you receive all your points
• If you make some mistakes, you receive fewer points
• Being fast gives you more points!
• If you answer in 1 second, you get the standard points
• If you\'re faster, you earn more points!
• If you take longer, you receive fewer points
• There are 7 different games: NÚMEROS⁺, DECI⁺, ROMAS, SUMARESTA, ALFANÚMEROS, MÁS⁺ and GENIO⁺
• Each game has 3 levels: Beginner, Advanced and Pro
• More difficult games and higher levels give you more points
• You can repeat any game whenever you want
• Play as many times as you want to improve your average response time
• Practice every day to increase your speed and accuracy!
30 levels. No mistakes. 24 hours. VICTORIS… Only victors will understand.
40 levels. Flawless. One single day. OPTIMUM… Only the optimal endure.
50 levels. Unbeatable. 24 hours. INVICTUS… Only the indomitable prevail.
The journey is just beginning. Complete 250 games and INITIUM will be yours.
Your consistency will be rewarded. Reach 500 games and earn this medal.
Train daily. Reaching 750 games proves your disciplined mind.
Only the bold move forward. Conquer 1000 games without hesitation.
Your mind is steady. Reach 1250 games and strengthen your legacy.
Don\'t stop. Complete 1500 games and let your tenacity shine.
Face every challenge fearlessly. Earn this medal by reaching 1750 games.
Wisdom comes from experience. 2000 completed games will prove it.
Be the example. At 2250 games, your determination will be undeniable.
Dare to reach the top. 2500 games will take you to glory.
Greatness is built with effort. Reach 2750 games and claim MAGNUS.
Your legacy will transcend. Complete 3000 games to be immortalized.
For the fastest mind. Only those who take first place deserve this legendary crown.
For those who conquer second place in speed. The Celeris crown rewards your quickness and perseverance.
Third place in speed is also worthy of honor. This crown recognizes your mental agility.
Begin your journey. Master NÚMEROS⁺ Beginner and this trophy marks your start.
Keep pushing forward. Face every challenge in NÚMEROS⁺ Advanced.
Leave nothing behind. Reach the end of NÚMEROS⁺ Pro and earn CONFECTUS.
Start your decimal journey. Complete DECI⁺ Beginner and rise above.
Aim high. Finish DECI⁺ Advanced and ALTUS will be yours.
Don\'t stop. Conquer every challenge in DECI⁺ Pro with unwavering discipline.
Step by step. Complete ROMAS Beginner and leave your imperial mark.
Show your strength. Face all of ROMAS Advanced until the end.
Reach the Roman finish line. Beat every ROMAS Pro level and claim this trophy.
Lay the foundations of mastery. Complete ALFANÚMEROS Beginner with no gaps.
Earn your prize letter by letter. Advance through all ALFANÚMEROS Advanced levels.
Chase glory. Master ALFANÚMEROS Pro and let your mind shine.
Climb steadily. Rise level by level until you conquer SUMARESTA Beginner.
Only the tenacious go far. Face and complete SUMARESTA Advanced.
Strive for perfection. Finish SUMARESTA Pro without giving up.
Everything starts here. Complete MÁS⁺ Beginner and unlock your origin.
Make progress your mission. Advance through all MÁS⁺ Advanced challenges.
Become a model to follow. Finish MÁS⁺ Pro and honor your example.
Begin your rise to genius. Complete GENIO⁺ Beginner.
Let your intellect shine. Overcome every level of GENIO⁺ Advanced.
Unleash your full potential. Conquer GENIO⁺ Pro without looking back.
Eighth place. Leaves a mark in the ranking.
Seventh place. Excels in every challenge.
Sixth place. Its light does not go unnoticed.
Fourth place. Admired for their constancy.
Third place. Great in points and in spirit.
Second place. Only one rises higher.
Absolute peak. Occupies the first place in the global ranking.
Only supreme victors shall possess it…
This distinguished honor is awarded exclusively to those who complete all SumaMente challenges.
Excellence distinguishes you for solving 50 different challenges perfectly in one day, achieving the prestigious INVICTUS pin.
You mastered numbers! You\'ve completed all 70 levels of NÚMEROS⁺ Beginner, earning the INITIA trophy.
Advanced numerical mastery! You conquered all 70 levels of NÚMEROS⁺ Advanced, claiming the CONSTANTIA trophy.
Supreme expert in numbers! All 70 levels of NÚMEROS⁺ Pro have fallen before you, granting you the CONFECTUS trophy.
Brilliant start with decimals! You completed all levels of DECI⁺ Beginner, winning the VIA trophy.
Decimal precision proven! The 70 levels of DECI⁺ Advanced are yours, deserving the prestigious ALTUS trophy.
Absolute decimal mastery! You\'ve conquered all levels of DECI⁺ Pro, claiming the PERSEVERANTIA trophy.
Like an ancient Roman! You mastered all 70 levels of ROMAS Beginner, obtaining the valuable GRADUS trophy.
Imperial power in Roman numerals! You\'ve completely overcome ROMAS Advanced, winning the FORTITUDO trophy.
Total Roman domination! All 70 challenges of ROMAS Pro have been conquered, rewarding you with the glorious METAM trophy.
Alphanumeric foundations mastered! You completed ALFANÚMEROS Beginner, obtaining the FUNDAMENTUM trophy.
Confirmed alphanumeric genius! All 70 levels of ALFANÚMEROS Advanced are history, rewarding you with the PRAEMIUM trophy.
Supreme alphanumeric mastery! You\'ve defeated all challenges of ALFANÚMEROS Pro, reaching the magnificent GLORIFICUS trophy.
Mental calculation on the rise! You conquered all 70 levels of SUMARESTA Beginner, earning the SCALA trophy.
Addition and subtraction mastery! All levels of SUMARESTA Advanced completed, rewarding you with the TENACITAS trophy.
Perfection in calculation! You\'ve mastered all 70 challenges of SUMARESTA Pro, achieving the coveted PERFECTUS trophy.
Origin of your mathematical dominance! You completed MÁS⁺ Beginner, winning the important ORIGO trophy.
Exemplary mathematical progress! All 70 levels of MÁS⁺ Advanced have fallen, granting you the prestigious PROFICIUM trophy.
Example of mathematical excellence! You\'ve overcome all challenges of MÁS⁺ Pro, achieving the extraordinary EXEMPLARITAS trophy.
Ascent towards genius! You completed all 70 levels of GENIO⁺ Beginner, earning the coveted ASCENSUS trophy.
Magnificent mental capacity! You\'ve mastered GENIO⁺ Advanced completely, winning the impressive MAGNIFICUS trophy.
Unlimited mental power! All 70 challenges of GENIO⁺ Pro have been conquered, crowning you with the legendary POTENS trophy.
You haven\'t earned any decorations yet. Keep playing to get them!
Select a game to view its speed ranking
Play at least 36 levels of %1$s, 12 in each difficulty level, to see your speed ranking.
Your average response speed is: %s sec.
So far, your average time is %s sec per response.
You\'re marking an average time of %s sec.
Currently, you respond in an average of %s sec.
For now, your best speed average is %s sec.
Fast! Your current average up to now is %s sec.
On average, you respond every %s sec.
Good pace! Your response average is %s sec.
Here\'s your current speed average: %s sec per response.
To appear in this ranking, you just need to play %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
Keep playing to see your classification: you need %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro).
You still have some way to go. Play %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro to unlock the ranking.
%5$s, you only need to complete %1$s games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
A little more to go, %5$s: %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll see your position in this ranking.
Keep it up, %5$s! Play %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll enter the classification.
You\'ve come a long way! Only %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro to appear in the ranking.
You\'re getting closer to seeing your position. Just %1$s games left (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) to meet the requirement.
The ranking awaits you—only %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
%5$s, your effort shows! Just %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
Great progress, %5$s! Play %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) to unlock your classification.
Keep it up, %5$s. Just %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll be part of the speed ranking.
You\'re almost there! Only %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro to appear in the ranking.
Final push: %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll be in the classification.
The goal is very close—only %1$s more games (%2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro).
%5$s, you\'re about to make it: %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and your name will appear in the ranking.
Amazing progress, %5$s! Only %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll be ranked.
You\'re almost there, %5$s. Complete %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and join the fastest.
Speed is your ally—don\’t stop now!
You\’re doing great, %1$s! This is just the beginning.
Step by step, %1$s, you\’re getting closer.
You\’re in the zone, keep it up!
Great job, %1$s! That\’s how you get far.
This is what champions do—so do you!
Don\’t stop now, you\’re one step away from the ranking!
Inspiring, %1$s! The ranking is almost yours.
Wow, %1$s! Few get this far, keep going strong.
Go big, %1$s! Show what you can achieve.
Hi, %1$s! Play 36 levels to see your global ranking.
%1$s, you need to play 36 levels to unlock your spot on the global leaderboard.
You\’re not ranked yet, %1$s. Play 36 levels and your global ranking will appear here.
Let\’s go, %1$s! Once you complete 36 levels, you\’ll see your position on the global leaderboard.
%1$s, your global ranking will automatically appear after you play 36 levels.
Ready for the challenge, %1$s? Play 36 levels to enter the global ranking.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_1
plurals.item: %1$s, you\'ve played %2$d level. Only %3$d more to enter the global ranking.
%1$s, you\'ve played %2$d levels. Only %3$d more to enter the global ranking.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_2
plurals.item: Great progress, %1$s! You\'ve completed %2$d level and need just %3$d more to see your ranking.
Great progress, %1$s! You\'ve completed %2$d levels and need just %3$d more to see your ranking.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_3
plurals.item: %1$s, your account shows %2$d level played. Only %3$d more to unlock the global leaderboard.
%1$s, your account shows %2$d levels played. Only %3$d more to unlock the global leaderboard.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_4
plurals.item: %1$s, you\'ve played %2$d out of 36 levels. Just %3$d more to join the leaderboard.
%1$s, you\'ve played %2$d out of 36 levels. Just %3$d more to join the leaderboard.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_5
plurals.item: %1$s, you\'ve finished %2$d level. Play %3$d more to appear in the global ranking.
%1$s, you\'ve finished %2$d levels. Play %3$d more to appear in the global ranking.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_6
plurals.item: %1$s, you\'re just %3$d level away from the 36 needed. You\'ve already played %2$d!
%1$s, you\'re just %3$d levels away from the 36 needed. You\'ve already played %2$d!

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_7
plurals.item: You\'ve played %1$d level. Only %2$d more to appear in the global ranking.
You\'ve played %1$d levels. Only %2$d more to appear in the global ranking.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_8
plurals.item: You\'re on the right track! %1$d level played, just %2$d more and you\'ll be ranked.
You\'re on the right track! %1$d levels played, just %2$d more and you\'ll be ranked.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_9
plurals.item: %1$d level completed. Only %2$d more to unlock your global ranking.
%1$d levels completed. Only %2$d more to unlock your global ranking.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_10
plurals.item: Progress: %1$d out of 36 levels played. %2$d more to reach the global leaderboard.
Progress: %1$d out of 36 levels played. %2$d more to reach the global leaderboard.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_11
plurals.item: %1$d level finished. Just %2$d more to see your spot in the ranking.
%1$d levels finished. Just %2$d more to see your spot in the ranking.

plurals.name: msg_info_global_levels_12
plurals.item: Only %2$d more level to join the global ranking. You\'ve already played %1$d!
Only %2$d more levels to join the global ranking. You\'ve already played %1$d!

resources.string: You\’ve got this, %1$s! Every level gets you closer to the global ranking.
%1$s, keep it up! The global leaderboard is getting closer.
Don\’t stop now, %1$s. Your effort will pay off soon!
Keep playing, %1$s! The global ranking is waiting for you.
%1$s, every game counts. You\’re almost at the global leaderboard!
Go for it, %1$s! Soon you\'ll see your name among the best.
Don\’t give up! Every level gets you closer to the global ranking.
You\’re so close! Just a little more to make it.
Keep going! The global leaderboard is within your reach.
Great job! Keep it up and you’ll appear in the ranking soon.
Let\’s go for more levels! The global leaderboard is waiting for you.
The goal is near! Keep playing to reach the global ranking.
%1$s, play 22 rounds—at least one in each game and each difficulty level—to appear in the IQ+ Ranking.
Hello, %1$s! Start your journey in SumaMente by playing at least one level in every game and difficulty to compete in the IQ+ Ranking.
%1$s, you haven\'t started your IQ+ Ranking journey yet. Play a level in every game and difficulty to see your position and build your index.
Let\'s go, %1$s! When you complete a level in every game and difficulty, you\'ll see your IQ+ and compare yourself with other players.
%1$s, the first step to stand out in the IQ+ Ranking is to play 22 levels—one in every game and difficulty. Get started today!
Ready for a challenge, %1$s? Play at least 22 different games, one in each difficulty, and unlock your place in the IQ+ Ranking.
For now, your IQ+ is %1$.2f points. Keep playing to improve it!
Provisional IQ+ index: %1$.2f. Play every game and difficulty to compete in the ranking.
You\'re developing your IQ+ in SumaMente: %1$.2f.
IQ+ calculated so far: %1$.2f. Every new level counts.
This is your current IQ+: %1$.2f. Complete all games and difficulties to unlock the ranking!

plurals.name: msg_iqplus_levels_info_1
plurals.item: %1$s, you have played in %2$d different game and difficulty. You need %3$d more to appear in the IQ+ Ranking.
%1$s, you have played in %2$d different games and difficulties. You need %3$d more to appear in the IQ+ Ranking.

plurals.name: msg_iqplus_levels_info_2
plurals.item: %1$s, you have completed %2$d round in different games and difficulties. Only %3$d more to unlock your IQ+ ranking.
%1$s, you have completed %2$d rounds in different games and difficulties. Only %3$d more to unlock your IQ+ ranking.

plurals.name: msg_iqplus_levels_info_3
plurals.item: %1$s, you\'re progressing: %2$d played, %3$d left. Keep going to reach the IQ+ ranking!
%1$s, you\'re progressing: %2$d played, %3$d left. Keep going to reach the IQ+ ranking!

plurals.name: msg_iqplus_levels_info_4
plurals.item: You have played in %2$d different game and difficulty. %3$d left to unlock the IQ+ ranking.
You have played in %2$d different games and difficulties. %3$d left to unlock the IQ+ ranking.

plurals.name: msg_iqplus_levels_info_5
plurals.item: Your progress: %2$d played, %3$d to go. You\'re almost ready to see your position in the IQ+ ranking!
Your progress: %2$d played, %3$d to go. You\'re almost ready to see your position in the IQ+ ranking!

plurals.name: msg_iqplus_levels_info_6
plurals.item: You\'ve completed %2$d different round; when you finish %3$d more, you\'ll appear in the IQ+ Ranking.
You\'ve completed %2$d different rounds; when you finish %3$d more, you\'ll appear in the IQ+ Ranking.

resources.string: Keep going! Each new game brings you closer to your place in the IQ+ Ranking.
Keep moving forward; soon you\'ll be ranked and know your position.
You\'re about to become one of the best in SumaMente. Don\'t stop now!
Great progress, %1$s! Just a bit more and you\'ll be competing with the best in the IQ+ Ranking.
Well done, %1$s. Each level brings you closer to your goal of being among the best.
%1$s, don\'t stop now. You\'re almost in the IQ+ Ranking!
I achieved position %1$d in SumaMente\'s IQ⁺ Ranking with an IQ⁺ of %2$.3f! Do you dare to beat me?
Global precision measures the percentage of correct answers across all your games. It is calculated as:\n\n(Correct answers ÷ Total games) × 100%
Global average speed is the average time you take to respond. It is calculated as:\n\nTotal time ÷ Number of completed games
Excellent speed, %1$s! You achieved 3rd place in %2$s. The VELOCITAS crown is yours.
Impressive quickness in %2$s, %1$s! You\'ve earned the VELOCITAS crown for your 3rd place.
%1$s, your speed in %2$s has taken you to the podium. VELOCITAS crown unlocked!
Bronze in speed for %1$s! 3rd place in %2$s grants you the VELOCITAS crown.
Exceptional speed, %1$s! 2nd place in %2$s crowns you with CELERIS.
%1$s, your quickness in %2$s is admirable. The CELERIS crown is rightfully yours!
Silver in speed! %1$s has conquered 2nd place in %2$s, earning the CELERIS crown.
Incredible time in %2$s, %1$s! Your 2nd place makes you worthy of the CELERIS crown.
SPEED CHAMPION! %1$s dominates %2$s with 1st place. VOLUCER crown conquered!
%1$s, you are pure speed in %2$s. 1st place grants you the prestigious VOLUCER crown.
GOLD in speed for %1$s! Absolute dominance in %2$s crowns you with VOLUCER.
Speed legend! %1$s conquers 1st place in %2$s and rises with the VOLUCER crown.
%1$s, you are our mental champion. The %2$s award is yours for conquering 1st place. An amazing achievement!
Bravo, %1$s! 1st place crowns you with the %2$s honor. Your intelligence knows no bounds!
Congratulations, %1$s! You\'ve reached 1st place and earned the coveted %2$s. Keep reigning!
%1$s, just one step from the top. 2nd place distinguishes you with the %2$s award. Don\'t stop!
Excellent, %1$s! 2nd place worldwide is yours, along with the %2$s honor. Keep improving!
So proud, %1$s: you have earned the %2$s for your 2nd place. A grand achievement!
%1$s, your brilliance led you to 3rd place globally. The %2$s award proves your skill.
Amazing, %1$s! %2$s shines for you thanks to your 3rd place. You\'re a role model!
%1$s, your talent stands out: 3rd place and the %2$s award are now yours.
%1$s, the admirable %2$s recognizes your arrival at 4th place worldwide. Keep inspiring!
Strength and perseverance, %1$s! 4th place is yours, accompanied by the %2$s honor.
%1$s, reaching 4th place and receiving the %2$s award shows your great capability.
Celebration, %1$s! You\'ve earned the %2$s award for your 5th place in the global ranking.
%1$s, your effort puts you at 5th place and grants you the %2$s honor. Keep shining!
%1$s, 5th place is yours, and the %2$s award recognizes your dedication and drive.
%1$s, the brilliant %2$s award is yours after reaching 6th place. Such talent!
Incredible, %1$s! You\'ve reached 6th place and received the illustrious %2$s. Go for more!
%1$s, your name shines at 6th place and the %2$s award confirms it.
%1$s, your prestige grows: 7th place and the %2$s award are now part of your story.
Great work, %1$s! %2$s is your reward for achieving 7th place worldwide.
%1$s, you stand out among thousands: 7th place grants you the %2$s award.
%1$s, your name stands out at 8th place globally. You\'ve earned the distinguished %2$s.
Such pride, %1$s! 8th place is yours along with the %2$s award. Keep growing!
%1$s, your skill placed you at 8th place, earning the %2$s award.
%1$s, your effort is rewarded: the %2$s award is yours after reaching 9th place.
Keep it up, %1$s! %2$s comes to you thanks to your great 9th place.
%1$s, reaching 9th place globally makes you a true %2$s.
%1$s, you did it! 10th place globally grants you the %2$s award. Enjoy this honor!
%1$s, your name appears among the greats: %2$s and 10th place now belong to you.
You inspire everyone, %1$s! The %2$s award celebrates your 10th place in the ranking.
You\'ve completed 250 unique games! Your dedication has earned you the INITIUM medal, the beginning of your collection.
500 games completed! Your consistency is admirable, earning you the FIDELIS medal.
The VIRTUS medal is yours for overcoming 750 different challenges. Your mental courage shows with every game!
1000 games dominated! Your boldness has led you to conquer the prestigious AUDAX medal.
You\'ve demonstrated mental strength in 1250 distinct games, deserving the exceptional FORTIS medal.
Perseverance has its reward! 1500 completed games crown you with the TENAX medal.
Your intrepid spirit has overcome 1750 challenges, granting you the respected INTREPIDUS medal.
Wisdom is acquired through practice: 2000 completed games make you worthy of the SAPIENS medal.
You\'re an example of determination! 2250 games overcome have granted you the exemplary EXEMPLAR medal.
Glory to your perseverance! You\'ve conquered 2500 challenges, achieving the glorious GLORIAM medal.
Magnificent achievement! By completing 2750 different games, you\'ve obtained the grand MAGNUS medal.
Immortal feat! You\'ve completed 3000 unique challenges, consecrating yourself with the legendary IMMORTALIS medal.
⭐ Next goal: FIDELIS - complete 250 new levels and this medal will be yours
🎯 Next challenge: VIRTUS - add 250 more games and unlock your next achievement
🚀 Your next conquest: AUDAX - 250 additional levels await you
💫 Road to greatness: FORTIS - continue with 250 new games
⚡ Advance towards: TENAX - 250 more challenges and glory will be yours
🔥 On the horizon: INTREPIDUS - persist 250 more games to reach it
🧠 Path to wisdom: SAPIENS - 250 new levels bring you closer to it
👑 Your destiny: EXEMPLAR - complete 250 additional games and be an example
🌟 Glory awaits you: GLORIAM - just 250 more levels towards the summit
🏆 Greatness approaching: MAGNUS - 250 more challenges for magnificence
✨ Towards immortality: IMMORTALIS - 250 final games for the legend
🏆 Medal collection COMPLETE! You\'re a SumaMente legend!

plurals.name: medalla_contador_progreso
plurals.item: 📈 You have %1$d medal, %2$d remaining
📈 You have %1$d medals, %2$d remaining

plurals.name: trofeo_contador_progreso
plurals.item: 🏆 You have %1$d trophy, %2$d remaining
🏆 You have %1$d trophies, %2$d remaining

resources.string: 🏆 This is your first trophy! 20 more to conquer
🏆 TROPHY COLLECTION COMPLETE! You are a SumaMente master!
You have obtained a new medal and a new trophy! We celebrate your exceptional merits
You have obtained the last trophy you needed and the glorious APEX SUPREMUS decoration. The SUMMIT belongs to you! 👑
1470 levels completed, you are worthy of the APEX SUPREMUS! 🏆✨ Your dedication and mental mastery have taken you to the absolute peak of SumaMente. 👑

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_1
plurals.item: You\'re on the right track, %1$s! You already appear in %2$d SumaMente ranking. Only %3$d more to access the exclusive Integral Ranking.
You\'re on the right track, %1$s! You already appear in %2$d SumaMente rankings. Only %3$d more to access the exclusive Integral Ranking.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_2
plurals.item: %1$s, your progress is remarkable: you\'re present in %2$d ranking. Conquer the remaining %3$d to become part of the elite!
%1$s, your progress is remarkable: you\'re present in %2$d rankings. Conquer the remaining %3$d to become part of the elite!

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_3
plurals.item: Congratulations %1$s! You\'ve entered %2$d ranking. Just %3$d more to reach the integral challenge.
Congratulations %1$s! You\'ve entered %2$d rankings. Just %3$d more to reach the integral challenge.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_4
plurals.item: %1$s, your name already appears in %2$d ranking. Only %3$d more and you\'ll unlock the Integral Ranking.
%1$s, your name already appears in %2$d rankings. Only %3$d more and you\'ll unlock the Integral Ranking.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_5
plurals.item: Keep it up, %1$s! You\'re in %2$d out of 9 rankings. Just %3$d more to go.
Keep it up, %1$s! You\'re in %2$d out of 9 rankings. Just %3$d more to go.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_6
plurals.item: %1$s, each added ranking gets you closer. You now appear in %2$d ranking and need %3$d more. Don’t stop!
%1$s, each added ranking gets you closer. You now appear in %2$d rankings and need %3$d more. Don’t stop!

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_7
plurals.item: Let’s go, %1$s! Real progress: you’re in %2$d ranking and have %3$d left to conquer.
Let’s go, %1$s! Real progress: you’re in %2$d rankings and have %3$d left to conquer.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_8
plurals.item: %1$s, you\'re close to the Integral Ranking: %2$d reached, %3$d to go.
%1$s, you\'re close to the Integral Ranking: %2$d reached, %3$d to go.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_9
plurals.item: Your name stands out in %2$d ranking, %1$s. Just %3$d more and you\'ll be among the best.
Your name stands out in %2$d rankings, %1$s. Just %3$d more and you\'ll be among the best.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_10
plurals.item: %1$s, add another achievement! You\'re in %2$d ranking. Only %3$d left to reach the integral goal.
%1$s, add another achievement! You\'re in %2$d rankings. Only %3$d left to reach the integral goal.

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_11
plurals.item: %1$s, you\'re overcoming challenges: %2$d ranking already has your name. Go for the remaining %3$d!
%1$s, you\'re overcoming challenges: %2$d rankings already have your name. Go for the remaining %3$d!

plurals.name: ranking_integral_progreso_12
plurals.item: Amazing progress, %1$s! You appear in %2$d ranking and only %3$d left for the big goal.
Amazing progress, %1$s! You appear in %2$d rankings and only %3$d left for the big goal.

string-array.name: ranking_integral_info_messages
string-array.item: Hello, %1$s! To appear in the Integral S⁺ Ranking you need to be present in all 9 SumaMente rankings.
%1$s, the Integral S⁺ Ranking is exclusive for those who appear in all app rankings.
%1$s, you don\'t meet the requirements for the Integral Ranking yet. You need to appear in all 9 rankings.
Come on, %1$s! The Integral S⁺ Ranking awaits you when you\'re in all rankings.
%1$s, your integral classification will appear when you participate in all 9 SumaMente rankings.
Ready for the challenge, %1$s? Access all rankings and unlock the Integral S⁺ Ranking.

string-array.name: ranking_integral_motiv_messages
string-array.item: You can do it! Each unlocked ranking brings you closer to the elite.
Exclusivity has its price. Show that you deserve to be among the best!
Don\'t stop! The Integral S⁺ Ranking is reserved for the most dedicated.
Every game counts. Keep advancing toward the absolute summit!
The goal is clear! Master all rankings and join the SumaMente elite.
Persistence is the key! Each new ranking brings you closer to integral glory.

string-array.name: ranking_estado_aparece_messages
string-array.item: @string/ranking_estado_aparece_1
@string/ranking_estado_aparece_2
@string/ranking_estado_aparece_3
@string/ranking_estado_aparece_4
@string/ranking_estado_aparece_5

string-array.name: ranking_estado_no_aparece_messages
string-array.item: @string/ranking_estado_no_aparece_1
@string/ranking_estado_no_aparece_2
@string/ranking_estado_no_aparece_3
@string/ranking_estado_no_aparece_4
@string/ranking_estado_no_aparece_5

resources.string: You have reached the pinnacle of intellect! First place in the IQ⁺ ranking and now holder of the supreme distinction SAPIENS SUPREMUS.
Golden mind! Your sharpness has brought you to the second place in the IQ⁺ ranking, earning you the distinction MENTIS AUREA.
King of academic brilliance! The third place in the IQ⁺ ranking is yours, shining with the distinction LUMINIS REX.
Prince of knowledge! You have achieved fourth place in the IQ⁺ ranking and earned the distinction DOCTRINAE PRINCEPS.
Great advisor! Your wisdom has placed you fifth in the IQ⁺ ranking and awarded you the distinction CONSILIUM MAGNUS.
First intellect! Sixth in the IQ⁺ ranking, you stand out with the distinction INTELLECTUS PRIMUS.
Optimum disciple! Your effort and perseverance have brought you to seventh place in the IQ⁺ ranking, earning the distinction DISCIPULUS OPTIMUS.
SUPREME POWER. Will you dare to conquer it?
GREAT HONOR. Prove you\'re worthy, go for it!
TOTAL VIRTUE. Only for those who give their all.
SINGULAR EXCELLENCE. Aim for the top, strive for it.
INTEGRAL GLORY. Your name deserves to shine here.
%1$s, your mental supremacy is absolute! You have achieved IMPERIUM SUPREMUS.
No one compares to you, %1$s. Total dominion is yours with IMPERIUM SUPREMUS.
Maximum honor achieved, %1$s! MAGNUS HONOR recognizes your greatness.
The highest recognition is yours, %1$s. MAGNUS HONOR crowns your effort.
Total virtue accomplished, %1$s! VIRTUS TOTALIS celebrates your mental excellence.
%1$s, your discipline and brilliant mind have earned you VIRTUS TOTALIS.
Singular excellence, %1$s! Only the best receive EXCELLENTIA SINGULARI.
%1$s, your excellence is unmatched. You\'ve gained EXCELLENTIA SINGULARI.
Integral glory for you, %1$s! The highest recognition is yours.
SumaMente applauds you, %1$s: you\'ve reached GLORIA INTEGRALIS.
To continue, please select your preferred language from the list.
Are you sure you want to change the language?

We celebrate your entry into the Integral Ranking! By appearing in all 9 SumaMente rankings you have demonstrated complete mastery of all mathematical disciplines. This SUPREMUS INTEGRALIS badge marks your entry into the integral elite.

Hello! I recommend this incredible app to train your mind: SumaMente.

Download it here:
This achievement in SumaMente was tough, but the reward is worth it. I dare you to try and match it! 😉
Challenge complete in SumaMente! 🏆 Think your mind is up to the task? Go on and prove it!
Is there a better feeling than achievement? This is SumaMente. Give it a try and let me know how you do!
New level of focus unlocked! 😎 Who\'s up for the next challenge in SumaMente?
My brain is on fire! 🔥 This achievement is proof. What a great mental workout SumaMente is!
This is what progress looks like. 💪 If you like challenges that make you think, you have to try SumaMente.
I did it! 🚀 Unlocking this in SumaMente feels incredible. Totally recommended if you like a good challenge!
Account successfully linked! Your progress is now safe.
Save your progress in the cloud
This will permanently delete your account and all your progress (points, levels, medals). You will not be able to recover them.
Connect your Google account in seconds and we\'ll make sure your progress is always safe.
You\'ve come a long way. Secure all your progress by linking your account so no one can take your place.
Link your Google account with a single tap and keep your data secure.
Secure your account in one tap.
Link your progress to Google and play with confidence knowing your data is protected.
Protect your progress! Tap here to link your account.
Got it, we won\'t bother you for a while.
Your progress will no longer be saved to the cloud and you won\'t be able to recover it on other devices. Do you wish to continue?
Do you want to link your Google account?
🧠 Brain warming up… Don\'t get injured!
🦸‍♂️ Genius mode activated… With great numbers come great responsibilities!
🔧 Calibrating favorite neuron… The rebel one cooperates!
🏆 Glory compiling… Get ready to shine!
🚀 Houston, we have a genius… Mental sequence initiated!
An error occurred while linking the account.
You can restore your progress, achievements and profile by signing in with your Google account.
Sign in with your Google account
No saved progress was found for your Google account.
Could not sign in with Google. Please try again.
Which progress do you want to keep?
You have progress saved in the cloud and on this device.\nDo you want to restore the saved progress or keep the current one?
Could not delete cloud data. Please try again.
Could not delete authentication account. Please try again.
For security, please sign in again to delete your account.
I got position %2$d in the Speed Ranking of the game %1$s in the SumaMente app with an average time of %3$.2f seconds! Can you be faster than me?
My score is %1$s points in the Global Ranking of the SumaMente app, I am in position %2$d. Can you beat me? https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.heptacreation.sumamente

I conquered position %2$d in the INTEGRAL Ranking of SumaMente! My average of %1$.1f places me among the masters who have mastered all 9 challenges. Do you have what it takes? https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.heptacreation.sumamente
Work with positive and negative numbers
Mix integers, decimals, Romans and letters
Welcome to SumaMente! 👋\nHere, math becomes a game and your mind gets sharper.\nReady to begin? 🎉
You\'re on a roll! 🚀\nEliminate ads for free: become a SumaMente Ambassador.\nInvite friends and family and get free Premium. 🙌
12 levels conquered! 👏\nWe\'d love to hear from you. Rate SumaMente on Google Play and help us grow. 🌟
Could not save username. Please try again.
We want to hear from you
Rate SumaMente on Google Play and help us grow.
Remove ads without paying: become a SumaMente Ambassador. Invite friends and get free Premium access.
Share the app with family and friends using your unique code.
Each person who plays at least 12 levels becomes a validated referral.
You\'re in control: redeem whenever you want for as long as you prefer.
We\'ll let you know when you have new validated referrals.
Join SumaMente with my code %1$s and improve your mental agility by playing!
You have redeemed %1$d referrals for %2$s. Enjoy the ad-free app from: %3$s until %4$s.
Good news, you have gained another validated referral, keep it up, the more referrals you have, the more free time you can redeem.

❌ Your referrals are not enough. 
🚀 Share SumaMente with family and friends, 
increase your balance and get free 
PREMIUM time 🎁
An error occurred while validating the referral: %1$s

Keep accumulating referrals; we will 
soon enable this feature and you will be able to 
redeem your referrals for premium time. 
We will let you know when it is ready!
🔎 We are developing Foco⁺. 🔥 It\'s going to be exciting… ⏳ Stay tuned, coming very soon.
Solve equations with numbers, letters, and Roman numerals
🚧 We\'re developing this difficulty level 🔨\n⚡ Coming soon, you\'re going to love it! 🎯🚀
Pay close attention, numbers, letters and more await you
Your mind misses you! 💡 Continue on level %1$d of %2$s (%3$s) and keep your streak going.
Let\'s beat level %1$d 💡. Can your mind handle %2$s (%3$s) 🤔?
Fun level %1$d awaits you 🎮. Ready for %2$s (%3$s)? 😉.
The goal is level %1$d 🏆. Show your skill in %2$s (%3$s) ✨.
Go for level %1$d 🧠. The challenge of %2$s (%3$s) awaits you 💪.
%2$s (%3$s) is ready for you 🚀. Continue at level %1$d 🌟.
Don\'t lose your streak in %2$s (%3$s)! 🔥. Next up is level %1$d 🎯.
The fun of %2$s (%3$s) is calling you 🔔. Let\'s play level %1$d! 🎉.
Welcome back! %1$s, do you have what it 🔥 takes? 🚀
Hello, %1$s! Ready for a new 💪 challenge? 🤔
Great to see you, %1$s! Your 🧠 mind was waiting. ✨
%1$s, let\'s train 🚀 that mind! Shall we start? 🎯
Let\'s keep going, %1$s! Your next 🌟 challenge awaits. 🏆
Hello again, %1$s! Show 😉 your great potential. 💡
Your mind is 🔥 ready, %1$s. Shall we go for more? 🧠
%1$s, it\'s 🎮 game time! Do you accept the challenge? 🤓
Enable SumaMente notifications \nin your device\'s settings \nto receive reminders.
Renews automatically. Cancel anytime on Google Play.
Price may vary by region and taxes.
Attention: a button\'s content will be hidden!
An error occurred while processing the redemption. Please try again.
You\'re currently not being shown ads within \nthe app, keep enjoying SumaMente

Master Roman numerals! ⚔️ Exercises with moving Roman numerals will appear. Perform the calculations by applying the value of each Roman symbol. If your result matches a button, press it. Otherwise, choose NONE and move on.

Decipher the alphabet code! 🔤 Each letter has a value according to its position: A=1, B=2, C=3 and so on up to Z. Calculate the result of the exercises by applying these values. If your answer is on the buttons, press it. If not, choose NONE and advance.

Sharpen your visual perception! 👁️ Observe carefully the 28 pairs of figures moving on the board. If any pair exactly matches the buttons, press it. If you don\'t find a match, select NONE. You have a maximum of 12 errors. Trust your sight!

Your mind is your best calculator! 🎯 Observe the 14 exercises moving on the board and solve them mentally. Press the button with your answer or select NONE if there is no match. You have up to 6 allowed errors. Show your mental agility!

Get ready for the mathematical challenge! 🧮 Mentally solve the 28 exercises that appear on the board. If you find your result on the buttons, press it immediately. If no option matches, choose NONE without hesitation. You have a maximum of 12 errors. Maintain concentration!

Demonstrate your mastery of time! ⏰ Correctly add the hours and minutes that appear on the board. Remember that 60 minutes equals 1 hour. Think calmly and look for the exact result in 00:00 format. If no option fits, choose “NONE” and move on.
Couldn\'t verify username. Please try again.
You\'re in the Top %1$s%% of this ranking. Do you want to know your exact position among all players?
Come back every day to build your streak and earn more coins!
Consistency pays off! Come back tomorrow to earn more
Use your coins to keep playing! That way you\'ll have space to win more each day 🪙

Activate your decimal mind! 🔢
Watch the 14 decimal number exercises moving on the board and solve them mentally.
The values are simple, but speed is your real challenge 🎯!
Press the button with your answer or choose NONE if there's no match.
You have up to 4 errors allowed. 🧮🔥 Show your precision!

Get ready for the math challenge! 🧮🔥
Mentally solve the 28 exercises that appear on the board.
If you find your result on the buttons, press it immediately. 🎯
If no option matches, choose NONE without hesitation.
You have a maximum of 8 errors. Keep your concentration to the max! 💪
You\'re now Premium! Keep enjoying SumaMente 🎉
